product.title: LickiMat Classic Soother Slow Feeder for Dogs Lick Mat Boredom Anxiety Reducer Perfect for Food Treats Yogurt Liquid Food Peanut Butter Fun Alternative to a Slow Feed Dog Bowl, Purple
product.description: Authentic LickiMat® Boredom Buster for Dogs and Cats. Perfect for Pet Treats, Yogurt, Peanut Butter, Spreads, Raw Food, Liquid Food, Pet Food. Slow Feeder, Healthy and Fun Alternative to a Slow Feed Bowl. Available in a Variety of Colours. REDUCES ANXIETY, BOREDOM AND DESTRUCTIVE BEHAVIOUR – LickiMat helps calm and soothe your pet as they enjoy their favourite treat by helping release endorphins through the promotion of licking. Great for when you leave home, great for stressful times such vet visits, injections, bath time, nail clipping, injury recovery as well as thunderstorms and fireworks. Please remember to supervise your pet when first introducing them to LickiMat. RECOMMENDED FOR BOTH DOGS & CATS – the LickiMat textured patterns are designed to please the tongues of both dogs and cats and to work with all manner of treats and foods, ranging from yogurt, peanut butter and all manner of spreadable treats to raw, wet, dry and liquid foods. The licking action enhances the sense of taste, allowing your pet to enjoy just a small amount of food. LickiMats are also perfect for adding supplements and medications to treats. PROMOTES LICKING – the LickiMat surfaces promote pleasurable licking for both dogs and cats. The licking action generates saliva that helps protect your pet’s teeth and gums, and can aid digestion as saliva contains enzymes such as Amylase. The natural rubber surface also scrapes food particles and odour causing bacteria off your pet’s tongue, promoting fresher breath. SERVE HEALTHY TREATS – the LickiMat allows you to serve a wide variety of treats: yogurt, peanut butter, purees, spreads and all manner of organic and healthy pet approved treats. The magic of LickiMat is that challenging your pet to lick the treat out of the patterned surface in order to be rewarded by the treat, slows the process dramatically and prolongs their enjoyment. Less calories, healthier treats and longer duration. SLOWER FEEDING & HEALTHIER FEEDING – the LickiMat can be used to promote slower eating, which in turn reduces bloating and improves digestion. A great alternative to slow feed bowls. You can even freeze food and treats on the mat for slower and more enjoyable feeding. ALTERNATIVE TO FEEDING BOWL – the LickiMat is a perfect replacement for all cat bowls and there are a wide variety of designs and colours to suit your preferences. The LickiMat is also a perfect dog bowl replacement for small and medium sized dog breeds. You can serve raw, wet, dry and liquid food at the same time without making a mess. For fun pet interaction, three designs are available. Lickimat Soother , with its brush tip design, is perfect for soft and liquid treats like yogurt, purees, gravy or liquid treats and foods. IF YOU HAVE A TEETHING PUPPY OR A NAUGHTY DOG THAT WILL CHEW ANYTHING, PLEASE ORDER A LICKIMAT TUFF™. IT IS VIRTUALLY INDESTRUCTIBLE AND ALSO DISHWASHER SAFE. made from non-toxic food grade TPR 20 x 20 cm/ 8″ x 8″ suitable for all dogs and cats (supervise pet for first few times until sure they will not chew mat) freezer safe microwave friendly hand washable
feature_bullets: REDUCES ANXIETY, BOREDOM AND DESTRUCTIVE BEHAVIOR – LickiMat helps calm and soothe your pet by helping release endorphins through the promotion of licking. Safe Alternative for your dog to lick. Perfect for stressful times such vet visits, bath time, nail clipping, injury recovery as well as thunderstorms & fireworks.

LICK MAT RECOMMENDED BY VETS AND TRAINERS - redirect all licking habits and perfect aid to reduce crate training time. Works with all manner of treats and foods, ranging from yogurt, peanut butter and spreadable treats, raw, wet, dry and liquid foods, allowing your pet to enjoy just a small amount of food. LickiMats are a perfect delivery system for supplements, medications and treats. Reinforce good behavior and replace anxiety with a long-lasting treat. Perfect for crate training.

DENTAL HEALTH - LickiMat textured surfaces promote pleasurable licking action, which generates saliva helping protect your pet’s teeth and gums. Scrapes food pieces and odor-causing pieces off your pet’s tongue, promoting healthier teeth, gums and fresher breath.

SERVE HEALTHY TREATS – Serve yogurt, peanut butter, purées, spreads and all manner of organic and healthy treats. Food settles in the mat’s surface which slows the feeding dramatically and prolongs enjoyment. Less calories, healthier treats and longer duration. THREE SURFACE PATTERNS: LickiMat Playdate (Squares) is perfect for small kibble, raw meat or fish. LickiMat Soother (Dots) for runny foods, and Buddy (Crosses) for chunky spreadable treats.

ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY AND SAFE: NO SILICONE. PLEASE SUPERVISE YOUR PET. THIS IS NOT A CHEW TOY. Please supervise your pet. If you have a puppy or known chewer, please order a LickiMat Tuff. It is very strong and 100% dishwasher safe. Licking, Lick Pad, Snuffle Mat.

specifications.value: This is not a chew toy. Please supervise your cat. Recipes, introduction tips and cleaning tips on website.

local.title: Great invention. Well made, convenient, useful, dog loves it.
local.text: I ordered a replacement for one I’ve had for years, partially because I also wanted to cut the old one up to use in different places or circumstances. Now we’re getting use to a soft sided small bag for airline travel. This, smeared with a spoonful of peanut butter, pumpkin, applesauce, or wet dog food is convincing my pup a bag is a fine deal! I like this particular mat because its sections are close together and licking it all takes more time. Discovering lickimats has been so useful and they keep my pup interested and thinking he’s getting fed more than he is because it takes longer!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 11, 2025

local.title: The dog knows best
local.text: I think it's hilarious to give a product review for a doggie item. I mean, my dog has not filed any complaints about this lick pad although I found the little "bumps" into which the canned pumpkin mixture is smashed became discolored by said pumpkin on Day 1. That bothered me but the dog continues to lick away, happy and with good guts. Discoloration having no affect on her day or my purchasing decisions. Oh, heck, let's go with the dog's review and give it a 5 star!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 28, 2025

local.title: It’s worth the money
local.text: The media could not be loaded. I would say this is a really good product overall. Of course it’s a little hard to clean completely if using peanut butter but honestly not extremely difficult to clean. It’s not rocket science though. Peanut butter is extremely thick. You have to scrub a little and apply a little elbow grease to clean as to be expected. The suction is 8/5. I slapped her down on the linoleum and she’s been there since I threw her. Extremely durable. My dog loves it! He can’t finish it and it will last all day. It’s hard to find toys/treat dispensing things for him because he gets so bored and he has yet to get bored with this. Worth the money and extremely rewarding for your dog.✨🤗
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on May 7, 2021

local.title: A great gift for my pooch
local.text: So easy to use and clean
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 12, 2025

local.title: Ok but not what expected
local.text: Lightweight and flemsy. Does not want to lay flat
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 27, 2025

local.title: Dog loves it!
local.text: I have been using these pads for over a year now. I use them to give a dog a peanut butter treat after his meal. They work great and he can sit there for literally a half an hour cleaning up a small amount of peanut butter. The small rubber bristles do eventually get literally licked off after a few mo the and when I start to see some gone I throw it away and replace it. Honestly I don’t mind because I love the way it keeps my dog entertained.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 14, 2025

local.title: Busy mat
local.text: Perfect size and my dog loves her peanut butter on it. It keeps her busy !!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on November 11, 2025

local.title: MY GOLDENS LOVE THERE!
local.text: Living in the desert, and with temperatures soaring to 120, taking my Goldens out for walks stopped. They were getting bored, I thought, day after day lying around the house. Looking for something for them, I ran across LIKI PADS! SCORE! Added a swath of peanut butter, easy choice, fast treat! Be sure it doesn’t have xylitol which is toxic to dogs, we use Skippy, no xylitol. Always check the label to be sure they haven’t changed ingredients. The little nubs on these, relax them and appease their desire to lick and soothe themselves. They ask everyday, same time in the evening, standing by the cupboard I store them! They enjoy, we enjoy happy pups! Win win!They go into top rack of dishwasher after we clean them up a bit if needed. They hold up really well!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 28, 2024

global.title: Liki Mat
global.text: It is great, my puppy loves getting the pate I have spread on it. I think it will be very useful, also a good distraction from maybe being naughty!! It doesn't slide around the floor either. Good value for moneyEnjoy
global.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 13, 2025

global.title: The only thing that works for our picky, anxious cat.
global.text: This might seem alien to cat owners who are awoken at the crack of dawn each morning by a chorus of starving felines, but I swear it’s true: our 9 year old cat is an extremely picky, reluctant eater. After she refused food for so long that she gave herself fatty liver disease and had to be fed via esophageal tube for several months, we tried just about everything we could think of to get her to eat. Kibbles, pâté, stews and gravy - she turned her nose up at it all. We resorted to liquifying her food and bottle feeding her, but even that lost its lustre after several weeks. Enter the lickimat. The food still needs to be mostly liquified (we use a magic bullet blender for this), but she can now eat independently and even seems to enjoy it! She now asks for her food instead of avoiding it. This product is quite literally a life saver.

global.title: Fantastic! Dog loves it.
global.text: The media could not be loaded. WHY have I never had one of these??My dog is 9!Absolutely fantastic.Super easy to clean which I was worried about.The tiny bits the dog leaves just rinse out then you can wash as normal.I was going to get a bigger one as my dog is huge, but she was panting when she finished this small one so it's actually the perfect size.Just make sure to tell your puppers it is a LICK mat not a DRAG BOTTOM TEETH THROUGH THE NUBS mat! (See video!)My girl is very strong and she didn't manage to bite or scrape off any of said nubs.I'm so happy with this, I'm going to buy another for when I freeze this one in the summer. Fab!
global.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on May 22, 2025

global.title: Keeps my dog occupied
global.text: I use these to feed my dog - he has a prepared raw diet so I spread it on this mat, and he loves it. We have three of them now but this one takes him the longest to eat. They’re really good value and wash up well.
global.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on June 11, 2023

global.title: Great for keeping pup busy
global.text: This is amazing, my pup loves it. Spread a small blob of cream cheese over it and he’s there for a good 15 mins licking it off. Easy to wash and keep clean too!!
global.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on August 1, 2021
